a176-1.description: GitHub PAT expired since s1653. 6th consecutive audit stale (A#172→A#177). SSH key generated in B#501 (s1679) but never registered with GitHub.
a176-1.resolution: STILL BLOCKED. SSH key exists at ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub but ssh -T git@github.com returns Permission denied. Key was never added to GitHub settings. Device code expired. Cannot fetch or push. ESCALATING to Level 5.
a176-1.metric_before: PAT expired 24+ sessions, SSH keypair generated but not registered
a176-1.metric_after: PAT expired 30+ sessions, SSH key still not registered. No improvement since A#176.
